title: problem with geographic query
description:
Hi,
when I do a geographic query using st_distance, I get the following error
"Virtuoso VECSL Error VECSL: Geo chekc ro id is to be a vec ssl.  For support."
what does it mean?
Thanks,
Pierfrancesco
key_bug_features: Error during geographic query using st_distance function
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE parking_spots (id INT PRIMARY KEY, label VARCHAR(255), geometry GEOMETRY, is_crowdsourced BOOLEAN, project_id INT);
INSERT INTO parking_spots (id, label, geometry, is_crowdsourced, project_id) VALUES (1, 'Spot A', ST_GeomFromText('POINT(7.5 45.2)'), TRUE, 101);
INSERT INTO parking_spots (id, label, geometry, is_crowdsourced, project_id) VALUES (2, 'Spot B', ST_GeomFromText('POINT(8.0 45.0)'), NULL, 102);
SELECT id, label FROM parking_spots WHERE ST_Distance(geometry, ST_GeomFromText('POINT(7.8 45.1)')) < 1000;
UPDATE parking_spots SET is_crowdsourced = FALSE WHERE id = 1;
